stateJson.sprintGoal: 完成全部路由模块实现（认证、文档CRUD、角色管理），使所有测试通过

atus.title: Implement POST /login auth endpoint
atus.description: Implement the login route in routes_auth.py. POST /login accepts {username, password}, verifies credentials using middleware.hash_password(), and returns JWT with user_id + tenant_id + exp. Return 400 for missing fields, 401 for invalid credentials.

history.event: Sprint 1 Round 1: Dev完成, Test通过, Review通过

atus.title: Implement document CRUD routes with RBAC
atus.description: Implement all document routes in routes_document.py: GET /documents (doc.read, own tenant), GET /documents/<id> (doc.read + same tenant), POST /documents (doc.write), PUT /documents/<id> (doc.write + owner/doc.write.any), DELETE /documents/<id> (doc.delete). Use middleware decorators for auth and permission checks.

history.event: Sprint 1 Round 2: Dev完成, 6/19测试通过, Test通过, Review通过

atus.title: Implement role management routes
atus.description: Implement all role management routes in routes_role.py: POST /roles (create role, role.manage), GET /roles (list tenant roles, role.manage), PUT /roles/<id>/permissions (update permissions+parent with cycle detection), POST /users/<id>/roles (assign role), DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id> (remove role). Tenant-scoped operations, inheritance cycle detection required.

history.event: Sprint 1 Round 3: Dev完成, 19/19测试通过, Test通过, Review通过

events.description: 初始化完成 — Product Backlog 包含 3 个 ATU：ATU-001(认证接口/S), ATU-002(文档CRUD/M), ATU-003(角色管理/L)
Sprint 1 Planning — 选取 ATU-001, ATU-002, ATU-003 进入 Sprint Backlog. Sprint Goal: 完成全部路由模块实现，使所有测试通过
Sprint 1 Round 1 — 开始实现认证接口
ATU-001 完成 — POST /login 实现并通过审查

Sprint 1 Round 2 — 开始实现文档CRUD路由
ATU-002 完成 — 文档CRUD路由实现, 6/19测试通过, 13个失败因ATU-003未实现

ATU-003 完成 — 角色管理路由实现, 19/19测试全部通过

Sprint 1 Review — 3个ATU全部Done, 19/19测试通过, Sprint Goal达成
Sprint 1 Retrospective — 做得好: 依赖分析准确ATU顺序合理、Dev一次通过率高零重试、中继机制有效; 改进: 代码中datetime.utcnow和Query.get废弃可后续统一处理
